etymology.description: phonetic 又(又) (yòu, 'again') + phonetic 又(又) (yòu, 'again') -> mutual reaching out -> friendship
etymology.interpretation: The character 友(友) (yǒu, 'friend') depicts two iterations of 又(又) (yòu, 'again'), stylized to suggest two hands reaching towards each other, symbolizing mutual support and assistance fundamental to friendship.

examples.chinese: 我们是好朋友(我們是好朋友)。
她喜欢和朋友一起去旅行(她喜歡和朋友一起去旅行)。
examples.pinyin: Tā xǐhuān hé péngyǒu yīqǐ qù lǚxíng.
examples.english: She likes to travel with friends.

examples.chinese: 每个人都需要朋友的支持(每個人都需要朋友的支持)。
examples.pinyin: Měi gèrén dōu xūyào péngyǒu de zhīchí.
examples.english: Everyone needs the support of friends.
